style: one-story light-beige horizontal-sided residence with a low cross-gable metal roof and a small projecting front-gable porch

floors.windowPattern: at least two white-trimmed rectangular windows are clearly visible; the moving frame does not support a complete facade count

notes: The principal entry sits beneath the small front-gable porch.

style: one-story peach stucco residence with a very low roofline and an integrated blue-gray screened porch across the right portion of the street facade

floors.windowPattern: at least one conventional rectangular window is visible left of the entry; the screened porch contains broad dark screened openings rather than ordinary glazed windows

notes: The principal door is near the middle of the unscreened peach wall and is partially obscured by vegetation.
Blue-gray horizontal framing and screening enclose the right-hand porch.
